description: Provincial fiscal account. Provincial because the scribal hand is less sophisticated than the documents produced in the capital. Mentions "dīwān bi-rasm" and maybe "al-muqṭaʿyn". Could be accounts or release of funds. Zimām alpha-numerals on the left, one of them deciphers to 1000 (for more information see - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1DVAGujbJbnaRODiBqV2ZdZW1rXYQN59XTiqkc3WuKLQ/edit#heading=h.15cigyv1fik6). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
